definition:
1. an estimate, valuation , (Euripides) 
2. an estimate of damages, a penalty , Lat. litis aestimatio, (Aristophanes Comicus):—;generally a payment , τύμβου for neglect of his tomb, (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
3. estimate of property  for taxation, rateable property , Lat. census, (Plato Philosophus), etc.; ἡ ἀπὸ τιμημάτων πολιτεία, = τιμοκρατία, (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
